Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) if &Context.Old_Perfil <> 3 DashBoard.Link() EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFENUM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFENUM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFENUM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &NfeSts = nullvalue(&NfeSts) &NfeProTer = nullvalue(&NfeProTer) &NfeEntSai = nullvalue(&NfeEntSai) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Monitora Notas Suporte' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do 'LoadPadraoUsuario' EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EditarSuporte = !'' If (&Context.Old_Perfil = 3) &EditarSuporte.Class = !'Attribute' Else &EditarSuporte.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &sdsd.Clear() &sdsd.AddItem(0, 'O Que Fazer') If (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA) &sdsd.AddItem(1, 'Reenviar NFCe') Endif If (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA and not NfeNum.IsEmpty()) &sdsd.AddItem(2, 'Consultar NFe') Endif If (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA and NfeSts = Status_NFe.Digitando) &sdsd.AddItem(3, 'Inutilizar Nº') Endif If (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA) &sdsd.AddItem(4, 'Solicitações') Endif If (1 = 2 and (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS and &AutNiv > 2) or (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA and (&AutNiv > 3 or NfeNum.IsEmpty()))) &sdsd.AddItem(5, 'Excluir NF') Endif If &sdsd.Count = 1 &sdsd.Class = !'Invisible' Else &sdsd.Class = !'Attribute' EndIf &ImprimirDanfe = !'' If ((NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA) or (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS and not NfeArqXml.IsEmpty())) &ImprimirDanfe.Class = !'Attribute' Else &ImprimirDanfe.Class = !'Invisible' Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &AuxEmpCod = EmpCod &AuxFilCod = FilCod //Ou NfeFilCod ? Do 'GetEmpresa' Do 'GetFilial' EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &sdsd.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &sdsd = 1 Do 'Do ReinviarNota' Case &sdsd = 2 Do 'Do ConsultarSefaz' Case &sdsd = 3 Do 'Do InutilizarNumero' Case &sdsd = 4 Do 'Do ConsultarStatus' Case &sdsd = 5 Do 'Do ExcluirNFe' EndCase &sdsd = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NfeNum1.Visible = False &NfeChv1.Visible = False &NfeCliCpf1.Visible = False &NfeCliCnpj1.Visible = False &NfeCliIns1.Visible = False &NfeVlrTot1.Visible = False &NfePedCod1.Visible = False &NfeCliCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFENUM' &NfeNum1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECHV' &NfeChv1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICPF' &NfeCliCpf1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLIINS' &NfeCliIns1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEPEDCOD' &NfePedCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NfeNum2.Visible = False &NfeChv2.Visible = False &NfeCliCpf2.Visible = False &NfeCliCnpj2.Visible = False &NfeCliIns2.Visible = False &NfeVlrTot2.Visible = False &NfePedCod2.Visible = False &NfeCliCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFENUM' &NfeNum2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECHV' &NfeChv2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICPF' &NfeCliCpf2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLIINS' &NfeCliIns2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFEPEDCOD' &NfePedCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NfeNum3.Visible = False &NfeChv3.Visible = False &NfeCliCpf3.Visible = False &NfeCliCnpj3.Visible = False &NfeCliIns3.Visible = False &NfeVlrTot3.Visible = False &NfePedCod3.Visible = False &NfeCliCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFENUM' &NfeNum3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECHV' &NfeChv3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICPF' &NfeCliCpf3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLIINS' &NfeCliIns3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFEPEDCOD' &NfePedCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFENUM' &NfeNum2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFENUM' &NfeNum3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ReinviarNota' if ModCod = '65' //NFCE ValidaSchemaNFe.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &Context.FilCod, &Mensagem) if &Mensagem.IsEmpty() GeraXmlNFeModelo65_4.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 'S', &Context.PesCod, 'E', &SolCod) wpAutorizaNotaRecepcao.Link('MonitoraNotasSuporte', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &SolCod) Else msg(&Mensagem) EndiF else //NFE ValidaSchemaNFe.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &Context.FilCod,&Mensagem) if &Mensagem.IsEmpty() GeraXmlNFeModelo55_4.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 'S', &Context.PesCod, 'E', &SolCod) wpAutorizaNotaRecepcao.Link('MonitoraNotasSuporte', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &SolCod) Else msg(&Mensagem) EndIF EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConsultarSefaz' GravaConsultaSEFAZ.Call('MONITORANOTASSUPORTE', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) wpConsultaSefazNota.Link('MONITORANOTASSUPORTE', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &SolCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do InutilizarNumero' // if ModCod = '65' //NFCE // wpInutilizaNumeroSuporte.Link('MONITORANOTASSUPORTE', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeNum, NfeSer, ModCod) // else //NFE wpInutilizaNumeroSuporte.Link('MONITORANOTASSUPORTE', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeNum, NfeSer, ModCod) // EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConsultarStatus' wpSolicitacoesNF.Popup('NOTA', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExcluirNFe' wpExcluirNFe.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"EMPCOD" &EmpCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFECLIRAZ" &NfeCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MODCOD" &ModCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEDTAEMS" &NfeDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &NfeDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFESTS" &NfeSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEPROTER" &NfeProTer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEENTSAI" &NfeEntSai.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFENUM' &NfeNum1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECHV' &NfeChv1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICPF' &NfeCliCpf1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLIINS' &NfeCliIns1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEPEDCOD' &NfePedCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"EMPCOD", "", not &EmpCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &EmpCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFECLIRAZ", "", not &NfeCliRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeCliRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"MODCOD", "", not &ModCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &ModCod, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFEDTAEMS", "", not (&NfeDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &NfeDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &NfeDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &NfeDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFESTS", "", not &NfeSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFEPROTER", "", not &NfeProTer.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeProTer, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFEENTSAI", "", not &NfeEntSai.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeEntSai, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFENUM' AND not &NfeNum1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeNum1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECHV' AND not &NfeChv1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeChv1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICPF' AND not &NfeCliCpf1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCpf1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICNPJ' AND not &NfeCliCnpj1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCnpj1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLIINS' AND not &NfeCliIns1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliIns1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEVLRTOT' AND not &NfeVlrTot1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeVlrTot1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEPEDCOD' AND not &NfePedCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfePedCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICOD' AND not &NfeCliCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFENUM' AND not &NfeNum2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeNum2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECHV' AND not &NfeChv2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeChv2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICPF' AND not &NfeCliCpf2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCpf2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICNPJ' AND not &NfeCliCnpj2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCnpj2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLIINS' AND not &NfeCliIns2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliIns2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFEVLRTOT' AND not &NfeVlrTot2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeVlrTot2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFEPEDCOD' AND not &NfePedCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfePedCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICOD' AND not &NfeCliCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFENUM' AND not &NfeNum3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeNum3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECHV' AND not &NfeChv3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeChv3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICPF' AND not &NfeCliCpf3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCpf3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICNPJ' AND not &NfeCliCnpj3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCnpj3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLIINS' AND not &NfeCliIns3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliIns3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFEVLRTOT' AND not &NfeVlrTot3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeVlrTot3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFEPEDCOD' AND not &NfePedCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfePedCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICOD' AND not &NfeCliCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Notas" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &SomenteComNumero.ControlValueChanged Do 'GravaPadraoUsuario' Grid.Refresh() EndEvent Event &ImprimirDanfe.Click IF ModCod = '65' //NFCE &NfeArqXml = RetornaXmlNota.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) if &NfeArqXml.IsEmpty() GeraXmlNFeModelo65_4.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 'N', &Context.PesCod, 'E', &SolCod) EndIF GeraPdfDanfe.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &UrlPDF, &UrlFisico) // RCOOpen.LinkOpen = Link(&UrlPDF) --não foi feito pelo RCOOPen pois nao aparecia as opcoes LinkOpen,etc..... // RCOOpen.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) --não foi feito pelo RCOOPen pois nao aparecia as opcoes LinkOpen,etc..... else //NFE &NfeArqXml = RetornaXmlNota.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) if &NfeArqXml.IsEmpty() GeraXmlNFeModelo55_4.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 'N', &Context.PesCod, 'E', &SolCod) EndIF GeraPdfDanfe.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &UrlPDF, &UrlFisico) // RCOOpenW.LinkOpen = Link(&UrlPDF) --não foi feito pelo RCOOPen pois nao aparecia as opcoes LinkOpen,etc..... // RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) --não foi feito pelo RCOOPen pois nao aparecia as opcoes LinkOpen,etc..... EndIf &window.Url = link(&UrlPDF) &window.Height = 800 &window.width = 800 &window.Open() EndEvent Event &EditarSuporte.Click if ModCod = '55' //NFe &WizardData.Capa.FilCod = FilCod &WizardData.Capa.NfeCod = NfeCod &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod = EmpCod &WebSession.Set('wpNota_Data', &WizardData.ToJson()) wpNota.Link('', 'Capa', false) else //NFCe &WizardDataNFCe.CapaNFCe.FilCod = FilCod &WizardDataNFCe.CapaNFCe.NfeCod = NfeCod &WizardDataNFCe.CapaNFCe.EmpCod = EmpCod &WizardDataNFCe.CapaNFCe.SolCod = 0 &WebSession.Set('wpEmiteNFCe_Data', &WizardDataNFCe.ToJson()) wpemitenfce.Link('', 'CapaNFCe', false) EndIf EndEvent Sub 'GetEmpresa' For each order EmpCod where EmpCod = &AuxEmpCod &EmpCodNom = substr(EmpCodNom,1,25) + '...' exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'GetFilial' For each order EmpCod,FilCod where EmpCod = &AuxEmpCod where FilCod = &AuxFilCod &FilCodNom = substr(FilCodNom,1,25) + '...' exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'GravaPadraoUsuario' &PadObs = iif(&SomenteComNumero = true, "1", "0") PadraoUsuario.Call('G','MONITORANOTASSUPORTE',&Context.PesCod,&EmpCod,&PadObs,&Today) EndSub Sub 'LoadPadraoUsuario' PadraoUsuario.Call('L','MONITORANOTASSUPORTE',&Context.PesCod,&EmpCod,&PadObs,&Today) &SomenteComNumero = iif(&PadObs = "1", true, false) EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
